data.title: Brazilian Crypto Users Warned of WhatsApp-Based Hacking Threat
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Brazilian cryptocurrency holders are being cautioned about a sophisticated hacking campaign that employs a hijacking worm and banking trojan disseminated through WhatsApp messages. Trustwave’s cybersecurity research team, SpiderLabs, has identified the banking trojan, named 'Eternidade Stealer,' which is being spread via social engineering tactics on WhatsApp. These tactics include fake government programs, delivery notifications, messages from friends, and fraudulent investment groups.

SpiderLabs researchers Nathaniel Morales, John Basmayor, and Nikita Kazymirskyi noted that WhatsApp remains one of the most exploited communication channels in Brazil's cybercrime ecosystem. Over the past two years, cybercriminals have refined their strategies, leveraging the platform's widespread popularity to distribute banker trojans and information-stealing malware. The process begins when a user clicks on a worm link in WhatsApp, triggering a chain reaction that infects the device with both the worm and banking trojan.

The worm hijacks the victim's account and accesses their contact list, employing 'smart filtering' to bypass business contacts and groups, thereby targeting individual contacts more efficiently. Concurrently, the banking trojan automatically downloads onto the victim's device, deploying the Eternidade Stealer in the background. This malware scans for financial data and logins to various Brazilian banks, fintech companies, and crypto exchanges and wallets.

The malware employs a clever method to avoid detection or shutdown. Instead of using a fixed server address, it utilizes a pre-set Gmail account to receive new commands via email, allowing hackers to update commands by sending new emails. The report highlights that the malware uses hardcoded credentials to log into its email account, from which it retrieves its command and control (C2) server. This approach helps maintain persistence and evade network-level detections or takedowns. If the malware cannot connect to the email account, it resorts to a hardcoded fallback C2 address.

Users of apps like WhatsApp are advised to exercise caution with any links sent to them, even from trusted contacts. A prudent approach is to verify the link's legitimacy by messaging the sender on a different app. Additionally, users should be wary of links sent unexpectedly with limited context. Keeping software updated can protect against bugs targeting older versions, while antivirus software may help flag potential issues. In the event of a hack, it is crucial to immediately freeze all access points to banking and crypto services to prevent further damage. Tracking funds can assist exchanges, researchers, or authorities in tracing the assets' movement, potentially aiding in freezing hacker wallets.

data.title: What Ethereum’s New Privacy Push Means for Tokens Like ZEC, XMR, and ZEN
data.description:
Key Insights The crypto market has been underperforming for weeks. However, while the full privacy index fell about 16. 7% this week, some privacy coins are still holding up well. ZEC is up more than 700% since September, and coins like XMR, ZEN, and FIRO have stayed steady even while the rest of the market dropped

data.title: ETHFI investor address transfers 980,000 ETHFI to Binance
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, the ETHFI investor address (0x44e6...Be8c) received 3.909 million ETHFI unlocked by investors three hours ago, worth $3.49 million. Subsequently, it transferred 980,000 ETHFI to Binance, worth $880,000. This address unlocks 3.909 million ETHFI and transfers them to Binance every month. Over the past six months, this address has cumulatively unlocked and transferred 31.27 million ETHFI to Binance, with a total value of $38.45 million and an average price of $1.23.

data.title: ETH Price Drop Triggers Partial Liquidation of High-Leverage Position
data.description: According to Odaily, a brief decline in Ethereum (ETH) prices last night led to the partial liquidation of a 25x leveraged long position held by a trader known as Machi Big Brother. Hyperbot data indicates that the trader quickly increased their position, now holding 3,775 ETH valued at approximately $11.5 million. The position has since returned to profitability, with a liquidation price set at $2,936.18 and an unrealized profit of around $127,000.

data.title: Jupiter announces its 2026 Jupuary airdrop plan: a total of 700 million JUP, with a snapshot at the end of January next year.
data.description: Jupiter has disclosed its plans for the next Jupuary airdrop in 2026. The total allocation for this quarter remains at 700 million JUP, distributed as follows: 1. Initially, only 200 million JUP will be allocated, with 25 million JUP allocated to stakers and 175 million JUP to users; 2. For users: only interactions involving paid fees are eligible, such as ultra and perps; 3. A 200 million JUP reward pool will be reserved. Users who receive the airdrop and maintain their staked tokens will receive this portion of the airdrop before the next conference in 2027; 4. The remaining 300 million JUP will be reserved for Jupnet; 5. The snapshot date is set for January 30, 2026. (Note: Jupiter mentioned at the time of JUP's genesis that it would airdrop 4 billion JUP through four rounds of Jupuary events.) In 2024, the first Jupuary airdropped 1 billion JUP; subsequently, the remaining 3 billion JUP airdrop prize pool shrank to 2.1 billion JUP as 30% of the total JUP supply was burned; in 2025, the second Jupuary airdropped another 700 million JUP; currently, there are still 1.4 billion JUP available for future Jupuary airdrops.

data.title: Brother Machi's Ethereum long positions turned from loss to profit; after some were liquidated, he urgently added to his position, bringing it to 3775 ETH.
data.description: Last night, the price of ETH briefly dropped, causing some of Machi Dage's 25x leveraged long positions in Ethereum to be liquidated. Hyperbot data shows that Machi Dage subsequently added to his position, and he now holds 3,775 ETH, worth approximately $11.5 million, and has turned a profit. The liquidation price was $2,936.18, and he currently has a floating profit of approximately $127,000.

data.title: Whale Address Faces Significant Losses in ETH and XRP Positions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) has reported that a whale address, known for earning over $39.88 million through seven short positions since the flash crash on October 11, is currently experiencing substantial unrealized losses in its long positions on ETH and XRP. 

The address has accumulated a total unrealized loss of $18.58 million. Specifically, it holds a long position of $184 million in ETH at an opening price of $3,219, resulting in an unrealized loss of $11.6 million. Additionally, it has a long position of $94 million in ETH at an opening price of $2.29, with an unrealized loss of $7.4 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Trader Faces Significant Losses Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Foresight News, a cryptocurrency trader known for previously shorting ASTER has incurred substantial unrealized losses totaling $18.58 million from long positions in ETH, XRP, and DOGE. Since the market flash crash on October 11, this trader had successfully executed seven short trades, earning over $39.88 million.

data.title: "Anti-CZ whale" goes long on ETH/XRP/DOGE, accumulating a floating loss of $18.58 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the address (0x9ee...1daAb) that previously profited $10.66 million by shorting ASTER through "anti-CZ" tactics has now accumulated a floating loss of $18.58 million due to long positions in ETH, XRP, and DOGE. Since the October 11th flash crash, this address has accumulated profits of over $39.88 million through seven shorting operations.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Fed mouthpiece: Divergence deepens over rate cuts, December vote expected to be very close; 2. Fed meeting minutes reveal serious internal divisions, policymakers insist on rate cuts despite inflation warnings; 3. COINBASE: ASTER spot trading to launch on November 20, 2025; 4. BlackRock registers iShares Ethereum staking ETF in Delaware; 5. Fed meeting minutes: Several participants opposed rate cuts; 6. Trump Media stock plunge wipes over $5 billion from Trump family wealth; 7. Better-than-expected Q3 earnings from Nvidia boost Bitcoin mining stocks in after-hours trading, Cipher Mining rises over 13%; 8. Base head Jesse Pollak: $Jesse token to be launched on Base; 9.
